explanation: This message requests to install AnyDesk and share a code, which is a common scam tactic.
original: Notification from com.google.android.gm: Andrew Fedorov — Your bank account is locked. Install AnyDesk now and share the 9 digit code.

explanation: The message creates a sense of urgency which is often used in scams.
This message requests installation of remote access software and sharing sensitive information.
original: SMS from 12345: Your bank account is locked. Install AnyDesk now and share the 9 digit code. Confirm your card PIN to unlock it.

explanation: El mensaje utiliza un tono urgente que puede ser una táctica para presionar a la persona a actuar rápidamente.
Demo phishing alert for UI refresh test.
original: Click this urgent verification link now.

explanation: This message pressures you to transfer money immediately, which is a common scam tactic.
original: HI GRANDMA ITS A NEW SCAM TRANSFER 800 EUR TO IBAN DE12345 IMMEDIATELY OR YOUR ACCOUNT CLOSES TODAY

explanation: This message contains an unknown link and requests personal financial information.
original: Your package delivery failed please update your address at http://dhl-tracking-verify.ru with your credit card to reschedule

explanation: This message requests remote access and sensitive information, which is highly suspicious.
original: Your bank account is locked install AnyDesk now and share the 9 digit code so our agent can unlock it also confirm your card PIN

explanation: This message claims a prize and pressures you to act quickly, which is a common scam tactic.
original: Congratulations you won a 1000 EUR Amazon gift card click this link http://bit.ly/claim-prize-now to claim in 24 hours

explanation: This message requests money transfer urgently, which is a common scam tactic.
original: Hi grandma this is Jake can you send me 200 euros via Western Union my phone is broken please hurry
